input.original_message: Hi, I'm Priya Sharma. The ceiling in my flat APT-2047 in Bandra West is leaking badly and furniture is getting damaged. Please send someone by 15th April. My number is 9876543210.

triage_report.draft_response:
Dear Priya Sharma,

We apologize for the inconvenience caused by the ceiling leak in your flat APT-2047 in Bandra West and are deeply concerned about the damage to your furniture. We are escalating this matter on an urgent basis and have scheduled an inspection to be carried out by 15th April as requested. Our maintenance team will be in touch with you shortly to confirm the exact time of visit. Please feel free to reach out to us at 9876543210 if you need any further assistance.

Best regards,
Real Estate Support Team
